title: viola pumila
intro: Viola pumila, also known as small or dwarf violet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Violaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola pumila include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep. Herbal preparations of Viola pumila can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
